LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Desc: Consumes one reactor saint sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and stages a reactor-phase manifestation that condenses into the Infernal Reactor Saint. This breach is built around ranged pressure, reactor shielding, heat saturation, and a visible phase-in arrival instead of an instant pop-in.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_Rewards: • Introduces the second full boss tier after the first vertical slice • High-value residue and future reactor-grade reward routing • Forces anti-artillery spacing and sustained boss pressure management
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_ReactorSaint_SideEffect: • Arrives through a staged manifestation instead of immediate spawn • Uses ranged volley and zone-barrage patterns to punish static lines • Later packages layer in full Aegis and phase pressure instead of treating it like a simple gun-platform
LanguageData.ABY_ReactorSaintSummonSuccessDesc: The reactor sigil has taken. A saint-class biomechanical breach has completed its phase-in cycle and the Infernal Reactor Saint is now crossing into local space.
